log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable, compressed with UPX, and has been detected as a spreader. It was run in three different sandboxes: CAPA, Tencent HABO, and VirusTotal Cuckoofork. I should investigate

The sample performs a GET request to mokoshoponline.com, which is a domain that has not been resolved to any IP address. This suggests that the domain is likely to be a non-existent or malicious domai

The sample does not appear to have any persistence keys, which suggests that it may not be designed to persist on the system after execution. I should investigate the dropped files to understand what
The sample drops a file called hhcbrnaff.exe, which is likely the payload of the sample. I should investigate the process activity to understand how the sample interacts with the system.

The sample creates a process called hhcbrnaff.exe, which is likely the payload of the sample. It also loads several notable modules, including system DLLs and other system components. I should investi
